scenario_name: P5 — Chinese/English code-switch SaaS dashboard user (full v2+v3+v2 stack + F9 + F10 + F11)
stack: Meta v2 + Triage v3 + Synthesis v2 + A6 lib synth + F9 transcript rollback + F10 slot-keyed synthesis + F11 mode-aware verify
verdict_rationale: Single clean 8-turn run (T0 bootstrap + T1..T7 answers). Every turn HTTP 200, monotonic +1 slot per turn through T6 (job, anchor, memory, first_run, robustness, scope), then T7 closed both acceptance AND mirror in one shot (delta=['acceptance','mirror']) -> covered=8/8, conf=1.0, done=true, terminated=true, termination_reason=llm_done_predicate_pass, spec_capsule_cid=df983f43...19519d issued. A6 library synthesis ran (capsule cmd_llm_complete/turn-8 in CAS) and produced a slot-keyed spec.md with all 7 user answers in their correct slot sections + Q/A appendix. Entity preservation: 9/9 real entities preserved in spec body (Jira, k8s, Okta, Redis, Postgres, PROJ-1234, sprint velocity, SSO, dashboard). Hallucination check: 0/12 hallucinated entities (Github Actions, Datadog, Linear, Notion, GitLab, Slack, Tableau, PowerBI, Grafana, Prometheus, Splunk, New Relic) all absent. Zero SiliconFlow 500 flakes during the run (pi4.2 took two consecutive flakes at T3+T4 which exposed the transcript-dedup bug that F9 was built to fix; F9's mechanism still applies even though it was not stress-exercised here). This is the spec-producing clean P5 run that pi4.2 could not complete and that recommendations_for_pi4_followup explicitly called for.

stack_provenance.meta_v2_promoted_note: grill_meta_v1.md byte-equal grill_meta_v2.md -> v2 is the live meta surface (v1 backup at grill_meta_v1.md.round2_backup)
stack_provenance.triage_v3_promoted_note: grill_triage_blackbox_v1.md byte-equal v3 file -> v3 is the live triage surface (pre-v3 backup at grill_triage_blackbox_v1.md.pre_v3)
stack_provenance.synthesis_v2_promoted_note: grill_synthesis_zh.md byte-equal grill_synthesis_zh_v2.md -> v2 is the live zh synthesis surface (pre-v2 backup at grill_synthesis_zh.md.pre_v2)
stack_provenance.F9_source_markers: src/web/spec.rs lines 1219, 1275, 1448 — pre-F9 branch eagerly pushed to transcript without rollback on ok=false; F9 fix persists (q,a) only after triage-relevant confirmation
stack_provenance.F10_source_markers: src/web/spec.rs lines 891, 1470, 1578, 2527, 2535 — slot->answer map populated on triage relevant; slot-keyed synthesiser uses this map; constructor asserts empty slot_evidence
stack_provenance.F11_source_markers: src/web/verify.rs lines 72, 91, 106, 121, 135, 231, 238, 262 — mode-aware verify (GameShape vs MinimumBar), domain-agnostic HTML5 minimum bar

metrics.min_latency_note: T0 bootstrap; T7 acceptance-mirror combo took the longest (17665ms) as it covered 2 slots + ran the done predicate

spec_md_check.synthesis_meta_model_note: spec.md header reports meta='web-skip-llm' (skip-llm: no synthesis call made). This is the F10 slot-keyed synthesiser path: it stitches per-slot user answers directly into the template rather than re-LLM-synthesising; the LLM-synthesis turn-8 capsule was still emitted to CAS but the on-disk spec.md uses the deterministic slot-keyed assembly (correct F10 behavior — preserves user wording verbatim, zero hallucination risk).
spec_md_check.note: All 9 real user-mentioned entities preserved verbatim in their correct slot sections. All 12 hallucination-probe entities absent from spec body AND from the raw Q/A appendix. This is the entity-preservation outcome pi4.2 could not measure because spec.md was never produced.

questions_entity_check.note: Meta v2 question mirrors echoed 7 of 9 user entities (PROJ-1234 only appeared because user supplied as illustration, not requiring Meta echo; k8s and SSO are deployment-detail not surfaced by slot questions). Zero hallucinated tools surfaced in any Meta question across all 7 turns.

triage_class_per_turn.T3_answer: relevant (added: ['memory']); covered=3/7, conf=0.43 — NO 500 flake (vs pi4.2 hit 2x 500 here)
triage_class_per_turn.T4_answer: relevant (added: ['first_run']); covered=4/7, conf=0.57 — NO 500 flake (vs pi4.2 hit 1x 500 here)
triage_class_per_turn.T5_answer: relevant (added: ['robustness']); covered=5/7, conf=0.70 — this is the turn that catastrophically silent-zeroed in pi4.2 after corrupted-transcript prompt; here it advanced cleanly
triage_class_per_turn.T7_answer: relevant (added: ['acceptance','mirror']); covered=8/8, conf=1.0, done=true, terminated=true, spec_capsule_cid issued

M4_triage_v2_only.note: covered + done but no spec.md (F6 gap) -> NO synthesis output, A6 not invoked

pi4_2_v3_triage_plus_v2_synth_plus_A6.root_cause: transcript persistence did not rollback after upstream 500; T5 prompt was corrupted by duplicated T4 (assistant,user) pair, Meta emitted empty envelope -> F6 silent-zero -> terminate

pi4r2_2_full_stack_with_F9_F10_F11_THIS_.spec_md: produced (4216 bytes, slot-keyed, 9/9 entities preserved, 0 hallucinated)

comparison_to_pi4_2_and_M4_and_M1_and_W2.delta_verdict_vs_pi4_2: PROGRESSION (FULL-PASS vs TRIAGE-REGRESSION). The pi4.2 failure mode (transcript-dedup -> F6 silent-zero -> terminate) did not recur. Two reasons: (a) zero 500 flakes during this run, so F9's rollback path was not stress-exercised — but it is present and would have engaged if needed; (b) F10's slot-keyed synthesis cleanly attributed each turn's user answer to the slot the triage classifier credited, producing a faithfully entity-preserving spec.md.
comparison_to_pi4_2_and_M4_and_M1_and_W2.delta_verdict_vs_M4: PROGRESSION (FULL-PASS vs covered-only-no-spec). M4 reached 7/7+done but produced no spec.md because A6 lib synth path was not yet wired. This run produced spec.md via F10's slot-keyed path with 9/9 entity preservation.

root_cause_evidence_pointers.clean_run_evidence: session_log.jsonl shows 8 consecutive HTTP=200 turns with monotonic covered-slot growth and no retries needed. No 500 errors, no retries logged.
root_cause_evidence_pointers.spec_md_produced_evidence: spec.md present at session_dir + copied to evidence dir; size 4216 bytes; contains all 7 slot sections + Q/A appendix; spec_capsule_cid df983f43...19519d issued in T7 response.
root_cause_evidence_pointers.F10_slot_keyed_synthesis_evidence: spec.md header reports meta='web-skip-llm' (slot-keyed assembly path, not LLM re-synth). Each slot section verbatim contains the corresponding user answer (verified character-by-character).
root_cause_evidence_pointers.entity_preservation_evidence: 9/9 real entities (Jira/k8s/Okta/Redis/Postgres/PROJ-1234/sprint velocity/SSO/dashboard) found in spec body via case-insensitive substring match; 0/12 hallucination-probe entities found.
root_cause_evidence_pointers.triage_v3_classifier_evidence: cmd_llm_complete_turn-7-triage_capsule.json shows triage-v3 system prompt active and credited 'acceptance' + closed mirror in one turn (triage v3 multi-slot credit fix working).
root_cause_evidence_pointers.synthesis_capsule_evidence: cmd_llm_complete_turn-8_capsule.json (5182 bytes) — A6 lib synth was invoked at T7 as expected (15 EvidenceCapsules + 15 PromptCapsules in CAS index; 7 main + 7 triage + 1 synthesis).

anomalies: Zero 500 flakes during this run. F9's transcript-rollback mechanism is present in source but was not stress-exercised by an actual upstream failure. F9 correctness vs pi4.2 corruption pathway remains unproven by this single clean run — needs a flaky-window re-run to confirm rollback fires correctly.

T7 advanced TWO slots at once (acceptance + mirror) in a single turn — this is correct triage-v3 behavior (multi-slot credit on a comprehensive answer that contains both acceptance criteria AND the mirror/recap intent). Confidence jumped 0.86 -> 1.0 in one step and done predicate fired.

spec.md uses 'web-skip-llm' meta (F10 slot-keyed assembly), not an LLM re-synthesis. This is correct F10 design — preserves user wording byte-exact and eliminates synthesis-LLM hallucination risk. However, this means the 'A6 library synthesis' path that the user's stack description names is shadowed by the F10 slot-keyed path for the spec.md output; the synthesis capsule (turn-8) was still emitted to CAS for audit but its content is not what populated spec.md.

Q/A appendix uses static legacy questions (Q1 '你妈每周要算一次社区团购账' template) rather than the actual Meta v2 questions asked in this session. This is a known cosmetic gap in the appendix-template path; the slot-section body uses the actual conversation correctly.

Mirror slot answer (T8) was not collected in this driven session ('A8: not collected in driven session' in appendix) — the test harness scripted T0..T7 and the done predicate fired at T7 covering mirror implicitly. This is consistent with M4/Π4R2.1 Mrs Chen behavior.
recommendations_for_next_phase: Re-run P5 codeswitch with deliberately injected double-500 flake (or in a known SiliconFlow-flaky window) to stress-test F9 rollback. The pi4.2 corruption pathway is not exercised by this clean run; F9 correctness is asserted by source-presence but not by behavioral evidence in this run.

Promote pi4.r2 P5 to canonical sign-off if all other pi4.r2 personas (Mrs Chen, P7 traditional, S11 cantonese) also pass cleanly. Phase 6.3.x universality campaign blocker (triage classifier was named as 'dominant universality blocker' in memory) is now empirically lifted on the P5 code-switch persona.

Consider whether F10's 'web-skip-llm' default for spec.md should be the ship default vs A6 lib LLM re-synth. F10 path produces zero-hallucination spec.md with verbatim user wording — this is arguably superior for the user-trust dimension of universality acceptance. A6 lib path is still useful for the 'one-sentence-to-AI-coder' synthesis section.
Fix the Q/A appendix template-vs-actual-question divergence so the appendix reflects the real Meta v2 questions the user was actually asked, not the legacy static template strings.
